---
title: "Prediction"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Prediction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)
source("_helpers.R")
```

```{r pred-data-load}
data("nc_posX100_p3_k2")
print_dataset_header(nc_posX100_p3_k2, "nc_posX100_p3_k2")
```

```{r pred-data-setup}
X <- nc_posX100_p3_k2$X
n_new <- ceiling(0.2 * nrow(X))
newdata <- X[seq_len(n_new), , drop = FALSE]
```

```{r pred-model-spec}
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = nc_posX100_p3_k2$y,
  X = X,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "gamma",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = nc_posX100_p3_k2$meta$K_true,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
```

```{r pred-fit-mcmc, eval=TRUE}
fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle, show_progress = FALSE)
```

```{r pred-s3-density}
predict(fit, newdata = newdata, type = "density", y = sort(nc_posX100_p3_k2$y))
```

```{r pred-s3-survival}
predict(fit, newdata = newdata, type = "survival", y = sort(nc_posX100_p3_k2$y))
```

```{r pred-s3-quantile}
predict(fit, newdata = newdata, type = "quantile", p = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.9))
```

```{r pred-s3-sample}
predict(fit, newdata = newdata, type = "sample", nsim = 200)
```

```{r pred-s3-mean}
predict(fit, newdata = newdata, type = "mean")
```
